text.title: Prompt Engineering — Reasoning Patterns — Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing the artefact shape this methodology produces.

example.code:
{TASK_DESCRIPTION}
Problem: <problem> {PROBLEM} </problem>
Think through this step by step:
<thinking> Step 1: [First step of analysis] Step 2: [Second step] Step 3: [Continue as needed] ... Final step: [Verification or conclusion] </thinking>
<answer> [Final answer only] </answer>
example.note: Worked example sourced from the prompt-engineering-reasoning v1 methodology.
